description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a dark gray mesh upper with vibrant orange accents, including the laces, inner lining, and a pull tab at the heel. The shoe has a sleek, low-profile silhouette with a white midsole and a black, textured outsole designed for grip. A prominent, stylized logo in white and orange is displayed on the side, adding a dynamic visual element. The lacing system is standard criss-cross, providing secure closure and adjustability. The toe area is reinforced, and the heel counter appears padded for comfort and support. The overall design suggests a lightweight, breathable, and flexible shoe suitable for urban activities and casual wear.
description: A dark gray athletic shoe with orange accents, white midsole, and a stylized side logo. Features a mesh upper, criss-cross laces, and a textured black outsole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stylized logo, orange laces, and the full profile of the shoe with its white midsole and black outsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the orange pull tab, padded heel collar, and the layered construction of the heel and outsole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the logo, orange laces, and the shoe's streamlined shape with visible stitching details.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the orange criss-cross laces, rounded toe, and the mesh texture of the upper.
attribute_logo: A stylized swoosh-like logo in white and orange on the side of the shoe.
